name: PolyTrack
author: Poki
description: PolyTrack PolyTrack is a time-trial car racing game where every run is about fixing the mistake you just made. At first you're trying to finish. After a few runs, you're chasing tenths of a second . Then you start noticing every small mistake that costs time. You take the first corner too fast. Restart. Brake earlier next time. Gain half a second. Instead of racing other cars, you chase your own best time to get better and better with each run. Play PolyTrack for free at Poki and jump straight into mastering each track! How PolyTrack works Every track is about replaying the same section and doing it better each time. You drive a section, spot where you lost speed and restart instantly. Now you try again with one change to see if it improves your time. Braking slightly earlier, turning tighter or landing straighter can cut 0.20 seconds from your time. Runs are short , so most of your time is spent retrying and fixing mistakes rather than racing . Leaderboards and ghost runs show where faster players gained time, giving you a target to beat. Progress comes from repeating sections until it starts to feel easier and more consistent. This turns messy runs into faster times Controls Simple controls keep your attention on steering accuracy and timing. Desktop: Drive: WASD or arrow keys Restart run: T Restart from checkpoint: R First-person view : C Pause game: Space bar Mobile: Use on-screen pedals to steer and perform all controls. Challenging other players You compete by comparing runs rather than racing side by side. Ghost replays and leaderboard times show how faster players take corners, which helps you understand where they gain speed and where you are losing it. Watching another run often reveals faster routes or places where you can improve your controls to shave some time off your score.
